channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Teddy Bridgewater, in 1st season as coach at alma mater Miami Northwestern, wins state title
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Former NFL quarterback Teddy Bridgewater went back to his high school alma mater this season and won a state championship. Bridgewater, in his first season as coach at Miami Northwestern High, led the Bulls to the Florida Class 3A state title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Navy pulls off upset over Army with Trump, star-studded group in attendance
item.description: The Navy Midshipmen are back in the win column against the Army Black Knights after pulling off an upset in front of President-elect Trump, Elon Musk and others.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: AP Pro Football Writer (AP) — Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Schroder set to be traded by Brooklyn to Golden State, AP source says
item.description: Golden State is acquiring point guard Dennis Schroder in a trade with the Brooklyn Nets in exchange for injured forward De’Anthony Melton, a person with knowledge of the agreement said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Army-Navy game is 'college football at its purest form' amid NIL era, sponsor's CEO says
item.description: Players cannot take NIL money if they attend Army or Navy, but that's what makes the legendary game "college football in its purest form," says USAA CEO Wayne Peacock.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA owner questions why Caitlin Clark was named Time Athlete of the Year, suggests it will cause racism
item.description: Washington Mystics owner Sheila Johnson said that Time Magazine should have put the whole WNBA on its cover instead of just Caitlin Clark.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC debuts inaugural jersey design for players
item.description: The first-ever jersey design for players of San Diego FC has been unveiled — and fans can already buy it.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Fencing organization pens open letter to USFA over concerns about trans athletes, stances on abortion and DEI
item.description: Fair Fencing Organization (FFO) penned a letter to USA Fencing this week over concerns about the governing body's stance on trans athletes and DEI, and its criteria for site selection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FIFA confirms Saudi Arabia as 2034 World Cup host despite human rights concerns
item.description: ZURICH (AP) — Saudi Arabia was officially confirmed Wednesday by FIFA as host of the 2034 World Cup in men’s soccer, giving the oil-rich kingdom its biggest prize yet for massive spending on global sports driven by Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: New Mexico QB Devon Dampier transferring to Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team has found its new starting quarterback. Devon Dampier announced that he is transferring from New Mexico to Utah, and will have two years of eligibility remaining.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC loses to Minnesota in shootout, 5-4
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Marcus Johansson had a goal and two assists for the Minnesota Wild, who rallied for a 5-4 shootout win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Robbie Gould announced as head football coach at Saint Viator HS
item.description: Former Chicago Bears kicker and franchise great Robbie Gould has been named the new head football coach at Saint Viator High School in Arlington Heights, and will begin his role immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox announce MLB coaching staff under first-year manager Will Venable
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have finalized their 2025 Major League coaching staff, adding two new faces in bench coach Walker McKinven and assistant hitting coach Joel McKeithan, and retaining the rest of the staff from the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs announce 2025 coaching staff
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs announced its 2025 coaching staff Monday under the helm of second-year manager Craig Counsell. There are four new additions to his staff, including replacements for third base coach Willie Harris and first base coach Mike Napoli.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description:
Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
Scheffler, the first player since Tiger Woods in 2009 to spend an entire calendar year at No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears vs. 49ers: Injuries, inactives and what you need to know for Sunday's game between two desperate teams
item.description: Two teams that have been through very trying seasons thus far will be seeking a much-needed win when the Bears and 49ers meet late Sunday afternoon in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
